brand.name: Northstar Labs
brand.tagline: From scattered signals to one clear next move.

captions.text: Customers are already telling you what comes next.
The signal is just buried in the noise.
Meet Pulseboard, the feedback command center
Bring every request, call, and support theme
Pulseboard connects patterns to revenue impact
so the right next move becomes obvious.
Less backlog debate. More confident building.
Start your product signal at pulseboard.example.

scenes.headline: What should you build next?
scenes.body: Feedback is everywhere. Clarity shouldn't be hard to find.
scenes.narration: Your customers are already telling you what comes next. The signal is just buried in the noise.
